headline: Bell Textron Selected by Near Earth Autonomy to Provide Bell 505 Airframe for U.S. Marine Corps' MARV-EL Program
summary: Fort Worth, Texas - Bell Textron Inc., a Textron Inc. company, announced that it was selected by Near Earth Autonomy as a partner on the prototyping of an autonomous Bell 505 for the U.S. Marine...
